summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Iteration 22: P1/P2 Features. All 18 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified: FlowSelector with 5 cards including 'Idee naar Realisatie', RoadmapView with 4 expandable phases, FEC Wizard with PDF/Roadmap buttons, ChaletWizard with Roadmap button in pricing sidebar, Recreatie Step5Quote with Roadmap button, SupplierProfile modal with enriched data (podcast, trendwatcher quote, top products, events, USPs).
passed_tests: GET /api/roadmap/phases/recreatie returns 4 phases (ontwerp, vergunning, bouw, exploitatie)
GET /api/roadmap/phases/chalet returns 4 phases (ontwerp, vergunning, productie, plaatsing)
GET /api/roadmap/phases/fec returns 4 phases (concept, vergunning, bouw, exploitatie)
GET /api/roadmap/phases/invalid returns error with available types
GET /api/roadmap/summary returns overview of all 3 roadmaps
GET /api/whitelabel/config returns RECRA Solutions branding with features_enabled
GET /api/whitelabel/configs returns both RECRA and Pleisureworld configs
GET /api/whitelabel/config/pleisureworld returns Pleisureworld config
GET /api/partners/profiles/ticra-outdoor returns enriched profile with podcast, trendwatcher_quote, top_producten
GET /api/partners/profiles/kunert-group returns enriched profile
GET /api/partners/profiles/arcabo returns enriched profile
GET /api/partners/profiles/campsolutions returns enriched profile
GET /api/partners/profiles/bbs-systeembouw returns enriched profile
GET /api/partners/profiles/ticra-outdoor/dynamic-top3 returns top 3 products (source=statisch)
GET /api/partners/profiles/invalid/dynamic-top3 returns error
POST /api/fec/pdf with products returns HTML business case document with summary
GET /api/ returns API info
GET /api/products returns products
Frontend: FlowSelector shows 5 cards (Recreatie, Chalet, FEC, Dashboard, Idee naar Realisatie)
Frontend: Click 'Idee naar Realisatie' opens RoadmapView with 4 phases
Frontend: RoadmapView phases expand on click showing actiepunten, deliverables, betrokken partijen
Frontend: FEC Wizard header has 'Business Case PDF' and 'Roadmap' buttons
Frontend: FEC Wizard Step 4 (Revenue) has PDF and Roadmap buttons
Frontend: ChaletWizard pricing sidebar has 'Idee naar Realisatie' button
Frontend: Recreatie Step5Quote has 'Idee naar Realisatie — Roadmap bekijken' button
Frontend: SupplierProfile modal opens from ChaletWizard supplier link
Frontend: SupplierProfile modal shows podcast section
Frontend: SupplierProfile modal shows trendwatcher quote
Frontend: SupplierProfile modal shows top products section
Frontend: SupplierProfile modal shows events section
Frontend: SupplierProfile modal shows USPs section
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - all data is hardcoded in backend modules (roadmap_engine.py, whitelabel_engine.py, partner_profiles.py)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 22 verified all P1/P2 features: 1) Roadmap Engine: /api/roadmap/phases/{type} returns 4 phases for recreatie/chalet/fec with acties, deliverables, betrokken_partijen, kosten_indicatie. 2) White-label Engine: /api/whitelabel/config returns RECRA branding, /api/whitelabel/configs returns both RECRA and Pleisureworld configs. 3) Enriched Partner Profiles: All 5 partners (ticra-outdoor, kunert-group, arcabo, campsolutions, bbs-systeembouw) have podcast, trendwatcher_quote, top_producten. 4) Dynamic Top 3: /api/partners/profiles/{id}/dynamic-top3 returns source=statisch (no live Supabase data). 5) FEC PDF Export: POST /api/fec/pdf returns HTML with business case summary. 6) Frontend: FlowSelector has 5 cards, RoadmapView has 4 expandable phases, FEC/Chalet/Recreatie all have Roadmap buttons, SupplierProfile modal shows all enriched sections. All flows working: Recreatie, Chalet, FEC, Dashboard, Roadmap.
